decisions.rationale: Observation base_record_id entity_mta-nyct already matches the existing canonical registry record entity_mta-nyct (MTA New York City Transit, agency, acronym NYCT). The observation resolves to its own base_record_id; no different target record to link to.

Observation base_record_id entity_nyc-dot already matches the existing canonical registry record entity_nyc-dot (New York City Department of Transportation, agency, acronym NYC DOT). The observation resolves to its own base_record_id; no different target record to link to.

evidence_refs.source_quote: New York City Department of Transportation
